name: Team Northam
subject: Join Governor Northam by supporting Jay Jones for Attorney General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
Friend,
Yesterday, Governor Northam announced he's supporting Delegate Jay Jones in his historic campaign to become Virginia's first Black Attorney General. Check out the story in the **[Washington Post](https://act.myngp.com/el/ueZqCa3YJgLGqnkasZ3lnZ4u6s1-_2csM1PZElz_QRI=/x2e4eMh5LORJc3SvuqE0-Zaim7rXpf0Hcohq1g0XvBs=)** , and please take a moment to read Governor Northam's note below explaining why he's supporting Jay.
**[We hope we can count on you join our fight to make Virginia a more equitable place for all and join Governor Northam in supporting Jay by making a contribution today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/ueZqCa3YJgLGqnkasZ3lnZ4u6s1-_2csM1PZElz_QRI=/2t2vPVjGaMB-qRmuLYNip91naPREG0vWjujJrcLG_Gc=)**
Thank you, as always, for everything you do.
\- Team Northam
| | | | | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ueZqCa3YJgLGqnkasZ3lnZ4u6s1-_2csM1PZElz_QRI=/_I5ypjnmh1BsAJwMKAzGsaOHpSdAlZpqwDq8ZhIkGGM=)
---
Friend -- We have made lasting progressive change over the last four years from Medicaid Expansion to abolishing the death penalty to criminal justice reform, but it is time for a new generation of leaders to take the reins. Jay Jones has stood with me every step of the way in our journey to make Virginia a more just and equitable place to live. He has been my partner as we have worked to change our Commonwealth. He also understands the deep scars of racism and will represent the diversity of our Commonwealth. _**That 's why I'm honored to endorse Jay Jones in his race for Attorney General.**_ As a state delegate, Jay has led from the front in fighting for long overdue justice reform, prioritizing our consumers, and protecting our environment. As the son and grandson of Civil Rights leaders and a descendant of enslaved Americans, Jay knows firsthand the kind of leadership it takes to bring about the change we seek across this Commonwealth, and I look forward to having him as our next Attorney General. **[Please join me in supporting Jay by making a contribution today so that we can build a Commonwealth that is more equitable and prosperous for all.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ueZqCa3YJgLGqnkasZ3lnZ4u6s1-_2csM1PZElz_QRI=/2t2vPVjGaMB-qRmuLYNip91naPREG0vWjujJrcLG_Gc=)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ueZqCa3YJgLGqnkasZ3lnZ4u6s1-_2csM1PZElz_QRI=/2t2vPVjGaMB-qRmuLYNip91naPREG0vWjujJrcLG_Gc=) Thank you for standing with me these past four years, and thank you for helping us secure our legacy by supporting Jay today. \- Ralph Northam

| Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
Richmond VA 23218 [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/ueZqCa3YJgLGqnkasZ3lnZ4u6s1-_2csM1PZElz_QRI=/GMftBlhW9ew3nGb4cpEGwm7_ZK87b-VvrV666oxnfIw=) |

name: Senator Young (R-IN)
subject: “American Rescue Plan”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
The so-called American Rescue Plan passed by the House during a vote in the middle of the night is now in the Senate. This 1.9 TRILLION dollar bill is nothing more than another wasteful, pork-barrel spending liberal wish list for deep blue states. **Want to hear more? President Biden said America will not get back to normal until next year.**

[**ADD YOU NAME - REOPEN AMERICA**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017gADpfkVHifHim6Cc4Ue02Ja4WIIThv9bfz7pzMoDIrbeQzZU52SnBGtPZUstrMKNWxmECIRp_1FcIi21CDeSBImdqBjRmL83PO5kdqbzzOfupqsqq-NX0H5ChsqpDoTgJf-ImMXysyYmZXKsmntTL-vDlPiL4mZCOOAvPe6xtmTM29hGSvuZjfpQVFkXQU6vzx31aaEWaylKNxk9czvXG81EKahYNohfxInIhKPzXRa8ZXAABaZGxHbBeG9F1BeahCWxGZT8i4gVXC7btqcpN-9B7vKMpfc2qFJ2qk_TFcxbHmtWLZYeJThLHC4r_7uqUfsjxgWCyT1ACORV0hjELxZLEq-KIRdr9YmsFRcy5gPYQheJwrq2TzLvjf9yS3aVW1t36MGaAw3SdLVb1IUKdYvzMPIz5_XbyXd-rpJBTgzN-z7uy0Ry1hdQEj3E_9i&c=Zsz62_4xDlYHPpNwmwQscEF4uqy5Gh0ula7-3lzCwVQ1O5RXWpYTuQ==&ch=Jm8Ek1Rv12CseeqmL8ZaL229wQisatbiaBDH4jfmDl78n9K5kSye0w==)
---

While millions of Americans live in states with partial lockdowns, Democrats are passing pet projects. What kind of spending projects are in this bill? Here are just a few projects that have nothing to do with COVID relief.

**1\. $4.5 billion for public transportation in New York
2\. $50 million for "climate justice"
3\. $50 million for family planning, which includes abortion
providers**

I am working hard to ensure this so-called American Rescue Plan does not reward pet projects to Democrat politicians instead of making reopening our country a priority. **I need you to add your name to my petition to reopen America right now.**

[**ADD YOUR NAME - REOPEN AMERICA**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017gADpfkVHifHim6Cc4Ue02Ja4WIIThv9bfz7pzMoDIrbeQzZU52SnBGtPZUstrMKNWxmECIRp_1FcIi21CDeSBImdqBjRmL83PO5kdqbzzOfupqsqq-NX0H5ChsqpDoTgJf-ImMXysyYmZXKsmntTL-vDlPiL4mZCOOAvPe6xtmTM29hGSvuZjfpQVFkXQU6vzx31aaEWaylKNxk9czvXG81EKahYNohfxInIhKPzXRa8ZXAABaZGxHbBeG9F1BeahCWxGZT8i4gVXC7btqcpN-9B7vKMpfc2qFJ2qk_TFcxbHmtWLZYeJThLHC4r_7uqUfsjxgWCyT1ACORV0hjELxZLEq-KIRdr9YmsFRcy5gPYQheJwrq2TzLvjf9yS3aVW1t36MGaAw3SdLVb1IUKdYvzMPIz5_XbyXd-rpJBTgzN-z7uy0Ry1hdQEj3E_9i&c=Zsz62_4xDlYHPpNwmwQscEF4uqy5Gh0ula7-3lzCwVQ1O5RXWpYTuQ==&ch=Jm8Ek1Rv12CseeqmL8ZaL229wQisatbiaBDH4jfmDl78n9K5kSye0w==)
---

Thank you,

Senator Todd Young

name: Mark, NRCC
subject: “Dr. Seuss is now canceled! There’s nothing you can do.” Well, trusted patriot, I disagree. How ’bout you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We have 1 hour to take action.

The Far Left is determined
To CANCEL all things
Their next victim decided --
**Dr. Seuss!** _That one stings._

There's no telling who and what's next
On their long list of bans.
We can't sit back & do nothing!
Democrats & Socialism walk hand-n-hand!

To fight for what's right,

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: This is why Bill Lee needs to go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Peter,
Republican leadership is out of control. Bill Lee and his GOP conspiracy theorists spend their time designing and passing hate legislation that will take our state backwards instead of forwards. This is why we need to defeat Bill Lee – this is why I’m asking for your help.
A month after Lee bragged about vaccine distribution, we’ve now learned that Tennessee has one of the slowest rollouts in the country. Lee’s bill to abolish handgun permits already passed through its first committee. A GOP bill targeting trans students who want to play sports in middle and high school passed the full Senate. Republican Senators – bitter from seeing Black men kneel in protest of racial injustice – admonished the president of ETSU during a budget hearing.
None of this is ok, and Tennesseeans deserve better. The TNDP is committed to doing everything in our power to turn Tennessee Blue in 2022 and defeat this reckless agenda. Will you help by making a donation today? We need some help. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
P.S. Please, only donate if you can afford to. The impacts of this pandemic are real, and we completely understand if times are tough right now.
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: Giffords.org
subject: Humbly asking you to chip in $3 to help Gabby lead the fight to change our gun laws
body:
It's been ten years since a gunman tried to assassinate Gabby during a meeting with her constituents.
#

Friends -
It's been more than ten years since a gunman tried to assassinate Gabby during a meeting with her constituents. While she survived, six did not, and 13 others were shot.
For Gabby, the road to recovery has been difficult, but she gets stronger and tackles new challenges every day.
_(Photo Credit: Cassidy Araiza for Vanity Fair)_
After Gabby resigned from Congress, she focused on regaining her strength and rebuilding her life.
But then a gunman killed 26 people, including 20 children, at Sandy Hook Elementary School. That moment spurred Gabby to reenter public service and found this organization. Since that tragedy, we've dedicated ourselves to making sure that no other family would have to experience losing a loved one to gun violence.
We were all disappointed -- furious, even -- when a minority of Senators blocked a bill to close loopholes in our background check system and made it harder for criminals to get guns.
But we also have won some great victories. Together, we've played a role in helping to pass more than 400 laws that will make communities in 45 states safer from gun violence.
(Governor Kate Brown signs bill expanding background checks in Oregon)
But now, thanks to the foundation we've built and a new administration being sworn in, we have an opportunity to change our gun laws nationally.
But the gun lobby won't give up without a fight. You know that. But they are no match for us if we stand together. Not now. Not in the future. That's why we are asking:
**[Can you make a $3 contribution as part of our 72-Hour Fundraising Drive that comes to a close TOMORROW at midnight? This is so important. There is so much at stake.](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee1c1/78fba3aa/60f4cff3/50aad1b7/3019360722/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMDUtMS1udGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210305-1-ntl")**
Thank you for all of your support, from both of us.
\- Team Giffords
**[DONATE](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee1c1/78fba3aa/60f4cff3/50aad1b7/3019360722/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMDUtMS1udGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210305-1-ntl")**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee1c1/78fba3aa/60f4cff3/50aad1b6/3019360722/VEsF/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

subject: It’s World Prayer Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
On World Prayer Day, please join me in praying for our fellow Hoosiers and Americans. Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470294?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=757e47bc4b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

Today is World Day of Prayer, and I know I join many of you in taking time today reflecting on how good God is, even during such tumultuous times as these.

Prayer is powerful and is something I’ve relied on throughout my entire life. There’s no denying that we have had a rough year, but God has seen us through. We are finally nearing the end of the pandemic and better days are ahead.

Please say a prayer today for your friends, neighbors, loved ones and fellow Hoosiers.

With grace,
Kyle Hupfer, IN GOP Chairman

body:
Joe Biden and his Democrat allies are building a war chest to outspend and beat every Republican in the Senate. Then they will finally have enough votes to force socialism on our country.
Friend,

Joe Biden and his Democrat allies are building a war chest to outspend and beat every Republican in the Senate. Then they will finally have enough votes to force socialism on our country.

[](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/hollywood-fundraiser-joe-biden/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210305_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1050434-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210305_hollywood-helps-biden.--will-you-help-me-first-name)

Now Friend, I _CANNOT_ say that I have as many rich and famous friends as Joe Biden. But I _CAN_ promise you that I will never sell out my conservative values and will always stand up in the Senate for what I believe.

[**Will you stand with me against the Democrat elite by chipping in any amount you can?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/hollywood-fundraiser-joe-biden/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210305_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1050434-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210305_hollywood-helps-biden.--will-you-help-me-first-name)

[**Will you stand with me against the socialists and chip in whatever amount you can?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/hollywood-fundraiser-joe-biden/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210305_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1050434-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210305_hollywood-helps-biden.--will-you-help-me-first-name)

[**Will you please chip in?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/hollywood-fundraiser-joe-biden/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210305_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1050434-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210305_hollywood-helps-biden.--will-you-help-me-first-name)

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Here are my objections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC
body:
Dear Friend,

I'm leading the charge to resist Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer's massive spending blow out. This isn't "Covid Relief" \-- this is a wish list of radical liberal priorities that will further mortgage our children's future.

My first objection forced the Senate to actually read the bill -- what a concept, huh? Now I will continue to object to bringing the consideration of the bill to a close until every amendment is voted on.

I can't predict how this will end, and the odds are against us, but I intend to resist. We simply can't let Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden pass this grotesque legislation without a fight.

Please join me in this fight and my ongoing efforts to reveal the truth.

Thank you,

Ron Johnson

subject: 50 and over are now eligible!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
It’s been an exciting and busy week for Indiana Republicans..

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470286?e=1acd9bb3d6)
60 and Over

It’s been an exciting and busy week for Indiana Republicans. Probably the biggest news was the further expansion of COVID-19 vaccine eligibility. Under Governor Holcomb, Indiana has been in the pole position in the Midwest when it comes to vaccine distribution and this week all Hoosiers aged 50 and over are now eligible for the vaccine. With the new, one shot Johnson & Johnson vaccine now available, our capacity is rapidly increasing to meet demand. Governor Holcomb and his team also announced the opening of three mass-vaccination sites throughout the state: Notre Dame, the Indianapolis Motor Speedway, and the Ivy Tech Campus in Sellersburg. With this new supply, increased eligibility, and the addition of mass vaccination sites, life is finally starting to return to normal. We’re not there yet, but we’re as close as we’ve ever been!

Also this week, we had the second meeting of our Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series with the class hearing from local government leaders, our attorney general, and other Republican leaders. The series is off to a great start and the inaugural class is engaged. I’ve talked with the class during both sessions, and they really are setting a good foundation for the entire series. I’m looking forward to continued engagement with our series.

Senator Todd Young announced the start of his reelection efforts earlier this week and I was proud to endorse him. Senator Young is a fierce advocate for Hoosiers in Washington and I’m confident our Hoosier Republican winning streak will continue and Senator Young will earn a second term in the United States Senate.

And finally, this weekend we’re heading into reorganization for our county parties. I know I don’t have to tell this audience, but the county-level activity of our party is why we’ve been so successful over the last two decades. I’m looking forward to connecting with new and re-elected county chairs in the weeks ahead and look forward to working together as a united Republican Party in the policy and political battles that are ahead.

Thank you

Kyle

Photo: Chairman Hupfer speaks at the Diversity Leadership Series
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Getting Back on Track

Like last week, Governor Holcomb had some more big news this week about the expansion of vaccine eligibility. Currently, Vaccines are eligible to all Hoosiers aged 50 and over (https://www.coronavirus.in.gov/vaccine/?mc_cid=5499aeb329&mc_eid=UNIQID) . But that's not all! Governor Holcomb and the Indiana Department of Health have announced a huge opportunity for eligible Hoosiers to get vaccinated. This weekend, beginning on Friday at 8 a.m. the Indianapolis Motor Speedway will be the home of a mass vaccination clinic. Visit http://ourshot.in.gov?mc_cid=5499aeb329&mc_eid=UNIQID (https://t.co/cfAuXPLaoM?amp=1&mc_cid=5499aeb329&mc_eid=UNIQID) and enter ZIP code 46222 to register.

--> Click here for more information and to register for a vaccine <-- (https://www.coronavirus.in.gov/vaccine/?mc_cid=5499aeb329&mc_eid=UNIQID)

During his weekly briefing, Governor Holcomb announced that Indiana had a 3.5% positivity rate, down from 4% last week. This is the lowest the rate has been since September of last year! Hospitalizations have dropped to less than 100 a day and there are currently no red or orange counties. We're continuing to get back on track and it's all thanks to the efforts Hoosiers have made to combat the virus.

Governor Holcomb also announced the second-round of Next Level Trails grant awards. 18 communities and non-profit organizations will receive a combined $29.6 million for 70 miles of new trail development as a part of the second round of the Next Level Trails program. Combined with the 17 projects announced as part of the first round in May 2019, the Next Level Trails program has awarded $54.3 million in funding for more than 112 miles of trail throughout Indiana. The $90 million Next Level Trails grant program (https://www.in.gov/dnr/outdoor/9800.htm?utm_source=agency-website&utm_medium=&utm_campaign=&utm_term=&utm_content=&mc_cid=5499aeb329&mc_eid=UNIQID) is the largest infusion of trails funding in state history. To learn more, click here (https://www.in.gov/dnr/outdoor/9800.htm?utm_source=agency-website&utm_medium=&utm_campaign=&utm_term=&utm_content=&mc_cid=5499aeb329&mc_eid=UNIQID) .

To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on Facebook (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c97eaa2a82&e=bd22884127&mc_cid=5499aeb329&mc_eid=UNIQID) , Twitter (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5288cdf6c3&e=bd22884127&mc_cid=5499aeb329&mc_eid=UNIQID) , and Instagram (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a64dd61359&e=bd22884127&mc_cid=5499aeb329&mc_eid=UNIQID) !

Photo: Now eligible, Governor Holcomb received his COVID-19 vaccine at the mass vaccination site at IMS Friday morning.

Senator Todd Young Announces Reelection Campaign

This week, Senator Todd Young announced his 2022 reelection campaign (https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=2446553785478530&mc_cid=5499aeb329&mc_eid=UNIQID) . Now more than ever, it is important for strong conservative voices to continue serving Hoosiers in D.C. Join us in supporting Todd Young and our fight to take back the Senate and restore conservative values.

--> Watch Todd Young's reelection announcement here <-- (https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=2446553785478530&mc_cid=5499aeb329&mc_eid=UNIQID)

1 Million Hoosiers Vaccinated

This week, we celebrated a huge milestone in the fight against COVID-19! Over 1 million Hoosiers have received the first dose of the vaccine! Indiana is continuing to lead the way and set the bar when it comes to vaccinations. Every time a Hoosier gets vaccinated, it means we're one step closer to bringing life back to normal. Currently vaccinations are open for Hoosiers aged 50+, first responders and healthcare workers. If you fall under one of these categories register for a vaccine at ourshot.in.gov
(http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f0de5e55195b475e87a05e683e823b00&_e=QxcVWklJdsZ2oREHxYuWQRmeSNN-s1lRKq6zjQLB-yXZrskGsqMyjYOSELJk-AYFefnKm3Zx34fsVZwodaYfXvJvxO4eH9IvtLilfuSJeZjk6tMsQ9oj-BAf_sWbBEVC7f0G5RccxmDf6kuevCkMdnB13_FCcMseVPSSpm4bjEHCZFV3kgrL3FnIfNJQ-UDwKj_wmVMiL0b0PAJUSA84pDbqRYdxS05UR8YSCaa5Kbf9ASm3Gq2CIe0Dkit3YK9hWcQEPnZQdj01-xOIb9-HFGVhZ3D7q2BdjI4tFbI6ORIvvPLiIRlZyl4oz-5bvB5gWvxWlDE5PJrD9sbqXQ6eulhBqyMtKOFgQ1lhMwoKuoHK9pmiviLi-6sS5iJb3xL2HntAfmQIcIHijNw7gt0zCJ3QJcnzIlFBv8_yAgZKx8IxxbraC_meCjtwYfBjgzoXVEQh_l3ePCixDBezGpNhpGigKw_w1evwypqaQKUNBvg%3D&mc_cid=5499aeb329&mc_eid=UNIQID) or calling 2-1-1.

Scam Prevention Week

During his first few months in office, Attorney General Todd Rokita has already been hard at work protecting Hoosier consumers from scams. Currently, he is leading a multistate action that will ensure attorney generals across the country can effectively fight abusive and financially harming robocalls.

“Hoosiers are sick and tired of being harassed by illegal and unwanted robocalls. Just as I promised when I ran for this office, we will stay on the offense in our efforts to protect Indiana consumers.” -Attorney General Todd Rokita

Also: Check out Attorney General Rokita’s appearance on Fox & Friends earlier this week: https://video.foxnews.com/v/6236772816001?mc_cid=5499aeb329&mc_eid=UNIQID#sp=show-clips

CPAC

The Conservative Political Action Committee annual meeting occurred earlier this week in Florida. Chairman Hupfer reflected on the importance of CPAC with this comment:

“Last weekend’s CPAC gathering shows that our conservative movement is alive, well and as vibrant as ever. Several great conservative leaders spoke about our paths forward to retake the White House and Congress. The critical theme throughout the weekend, as driven home during President Trump’s speech, was the importance of remaining united as a conservative Republican Party. Barely a month in, and we’ve seen the disastrous effects of Biden-Pelosi-Schumer agenda: killing union jobs, rising gas prices, closed schools, and open borders. A united party will push back on this liberal advance and win back the House and Senate in 2022 and, ultimately, the White House in 2024.”

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Why do we call 911?
body:
Because no one else is coming at 2 am
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sxFxN6k2_iq4GMz2uwfclWxAazd83a4FdRxutaFch2UFJN9xWugfqIEmo8VZS4BL_8agSOGzS8hxzV8vDCsFus5H3HotCDZIpZaVLfKo100gd50ylSGtN6UipqhFuP3kSc-Zg2WeJJg7PpPXZtJS6pYQHcIk091rlluKBnlkqBR0lCWnU23rICbXbX95WZJ45MrZXJ4UBFM=&c=toj9Cwi_6MPFEAdPAu-lGJUWhF56pZUxHr7ydz8QWv2_RmmK_aeIow==&ch=bsUQzJTIHIo7LJHdTZyBFfan_KBVkZg51c3v9rSW9cmBDH9MPHc87Q==)
---
| Patriot,
I am disappointed at how disrespected our brave patriots in uniform are. Let me tell you something, there is NOTHING a good cop hates more than a bad cop.
As a first responder's wife, the issue of defunding the police could not hit closer to home. My husband serves as a firefighter and a SWAT medic for our local sheriff's department. Under this new bill, my husband, and many brave officers, would lose the equipment that keeps them SAFE when they respond to unpredictable and threatening calls in their efforts to SAVE LIVES!
Defunding the police is not the answer here, as a matter of fact, if we want more good cops, more trained cops, and fewer casualties, [we need to FULLY FUND our police. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sxFxN6k2_iq4GMz2uwfclWxAazd83a4FdRxutaFch2UFJN9xWugfqIEmo8VZS4BL_8agSOGzS8hxzV8vDCsFus5H3HotCDZIpZaVLfKo100gd50ylSGtN6UipqhFuP3kSc-Zg2WeJJg7PpPXZtJS6pYQHcIk091rlluKBnlkqBR0lCWnU23rICbXbX95WZJ45MrZXJ4UBFM=&c=toj9Cwi_6MPFEAdPAu-lGJUWhF56pZUxHr7ydz8QWv2_RmmK_aeIow==&ch=bsUQzJTIHIo7LJHdTZyBFfan_KBVkZg51c3v9rSW9cmBDH9MPHc87Q==)
---
| | | [HELP US FIGHT AGAINST THIS MOVEMENT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sxFxN6k2_iq4GMz2uwfclWxAazd83a4FdRxutaFch2UFJN9xWugfqIEmo8VZS4BL_8agSOGzS8hxzV8vDCsFus5H3HotCDZIpZaVLfKo100gd50ylSGtN6UipqhFuP3kSc-Zg2WeJJg7PpPXZtJS6pYQHcIk091rlluKBnlkqBR0lCWnU23rICbXbX95WZJ45MrZXJ4UBFM=&c=toj9Cwi_6MPFEAdPAu-lGJUWhF56pZUxHr7ydz8QWv2_RmmK_aeIow==&ch=bsUQzJTIHIo7LJHdTZyBFfan_KBVkZg51c3v9rSW9cmBDH9MPHc87Q==)
---
| The "Reform Bill" is just another call to defund the police. There are many other real reforms we can implement that would make our police better, stronger, and more responsive.
I took my concerns to the House Floor because I am ready to fight to protect all those who risk their lives to protect us.
[STOP THE DEFUND THE POLICE MOVEMENT!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sxFxN6k2_iq4GMz2uwfclWxAazd83a4FdRxutaFch2UFJN9xWugfqIEmo8VZS4BL_8agSOGzS8hxzV8vDCsFus5H3HotCDZIpZaVLfKo100gd50ylSGtN6UipqhFuP3kSc-Zg2WeJJg7PpPXZtJS6pYQHcIk091rlluKBnlkqBR0lCWnU23rICbXbX95WZJ45MrZXJ4UBFM=&c=toj9Cwi_6MPFEAdPAu-lGJUWhF56pZUxHr7ydz8QWv2_RmmK_aeIow==&ch=bsUQzJTIHIo7LJHdTZyBFfan_KBVkZg51c3v9rSW9cmBDH9MPHc87Q==)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Put the worker first, Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Hillary called us "Deplorables" and Joe is calling us "Neanderthals." Now, I've heard it all... [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=5f641560237e4c17ac326aef39ce1ffc&_e=BQz5gK4LEGrzJ_AkKTojAcW7cYWd2RSZmQQPUjvOTO4cGt-BWygIVt2lYmz7qwP1CN93tDo8JexC4Ki8ElAWMyYAZlgEKpC4IHzvus3JzU3uj2k9O8MOJ5UbgsaBXYHvajeQsaF6VsGVAkwc7Jp766962qJmmsQFWmLxaaWOolfOgExOc4Tza1sXJ2Ng08794CkQGIbKTEC9BzRwubIQ9ZZhjpTqJsUphQseipoeuLNYUaG50AXSTgzSI2PsR2kTyu1y_rgJY8s49HyI3JoEd0yaxLx5P2_MKXDxymSlrRTX9gufq_kVaj7o7a6_rgNL1TVYKOCh88m9J7-G7kBlhAHY8KPTR0ByY3candEt0hs%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Hillary called us "Deplorables" and Joe is calling us "Neanderthals." Now, I’ve heard it all...

**Remember when Joe Biden pledged to, “be a president who seeks not to divide, but to unify...”?** That lie seems like an eternity ago...

Biden calls _**YOU**_ a Neanderthal if you disagree with him because democrats are terrified of regular folks following the science and being allowed to make their own decisions.

**Joe Biden should spend less time insulting Americans and more time passing a COVID relief package that prioritizes vaccines and the average American worker over _MILLIONS of dollars for illegal immigrants and taxpayer-funded abortion._**

The Biden administration has touted the “American Rescue Plan Act” as the, “most progressive piece of domestic legislation in a generation” and I agree. I just happen to think progressive legislation is bad for the country, especially when the average worker is at the bottom of the priority list.

That’s why I will continue to fight against bad legislation like this and fight for the average American worker, who has tragically been cast aside by the Democratic party.

_**Help my fight against name-callin’ Democrats like Joe Biden, by donating at the link below.**_
[_**DONATE HERE**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=5f641560237e4c17ac326aef39ce1ffc&_e=BQz5gK4LEGrzJ_AkKTojAYGItAxsviCVB_56WeAOcsewSDI0LylH2JHcGDC78IlVnpVaHyrZpJOkI9div1a7ceWFcim_S6g1qGecd3uiFoUHdHEgFhqSk__UOblY9BhEGbiefXssx2TTcUaq0e5y9-Bx9q80fyEdbx3fyF2fvmm0QJyRHU6qmia7s0PFhK34IpqlrVo7hmEIEuTgF3ErQ1gKaMk5aq231QWKmwiu2d4r5k-rO3Tgcf2N8ET-JW3fr96-zudw8RoTIoW7dKqQuHi3jo6kc9JsUOWUux6ib_trRUNKos1NdePG4tGsga82IVs3R5UPAeHxQhK2AuLciWp_mKph_zxZx6_J1NWs2SwtfUGXRU1UuXJWf-6WiyzcxsUaPy2-PCkgYqXEqT6K-zVux98wgVct5i7LSK-pvRg%3D)

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

clean_body: Hillary called us "Deplorables" and Joe is calling us "Neanderthals." Now, I've heard it all... | | Peter, Hillary called us "Deplorables" and Joe is calling us "Neanderthals." Now, I’ve heard it all... Remember when Joe Biden pledged to, “be a president who seeks not to divide, but to unify...”? That lie seems like an eternity ago... Biden calls YOU a Neanderthal if you disagree with him because democrats are terrified of regular folks following the science and being allowed to make their own decisions. Joe Biden should spend less time insulting Americans and more time passing a COVID relief package that prioritizes vaccines and the average American worker over MILLIONS of dollars for illegal immigrants and taxpayer-funded abortion. The Biden administration has touted the “American Rescue Plan Act” as the, “most progressive piece of domestic legislation in a generation” and I agree. I just happen to think progressive legislation is bad for the country, especially when the average worker is at the bottom of the priority list. That’s why I will continue to fight against bad legislation like this and fight for the average American worker, who has tragically been cast aside by the Democratic party. Help my fight against name-callin’ Democrats like Joe Biden, by donating at the link below. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

Iowa is coming back and we are coming back strong, Friend!

Now, they want Iowans to bail out states like New York, Illinois, and California who have kept their kids out of the classroom, closed their businesses, and completely mismanaged their budgets!
That's what we are up against, and it's why I need your help today!

name: Blaine Luetkemeyer
subject: Hi, I'm Blaine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blaine For Congress
body:
my name is Blaine Luetkemeyer and I have been the proud Congressman of Missouri's 3rd district since 2008.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i6_oL67rAMOikO0CcdTqAfKT2IdfQ9MuWMAr6kIhMvJf76uHuIAOXPT2IV1QsJ6v8FcH07Up3uo72WVLSVscG2QleSTKBDBV5FioWAvmtPoofZ0MUImWQHb8rwnGdhT5us15I0_CoSaTrN4fbagWMxzT5NJXnnIzkMwqtN0d0ssz1gwm1iDzxhburFzlMq6TM1iXPJBLzPqIAspNKSy5QPOwcl-gV2fCjjLEiISr-r7MrMFwMmFX-9kev8-IxLJ9x5xSAY4b5YZK0ovrsZ7JwkPNnX56TVGWia4zN7dXKP3EKAcNN7aW7--uiObcJ-ToZpcBAoXjatqt5vlR4M4aeN4rFRXT5T38lToPl5Kvf1xd9jQf37_jPnuD4zSOzBukYR79gSOChl-KAKF0ZhiIDm167TWjA8M7nNxK3Lhwq64=&c=3k796tcGCEo886Yl2zcw_ormC3eb6ior8FmV4OVXWIwYmGgdr-7gdQ==&ch=fDh_5wYHLV3GTvtvxtdqPqtfb6yBHb4jfS4PuDG1tM8tMTWfJtBuKQ==)

Hey there, Friend, my name is Blaine Luetkemeyer and I have been the proud Congressman of Missouri's 3rd district since 2008.

You may not have heard of me, and that's ok. I'll be honest, I'm not very interested in the showboating that seems to have become such a major part of politics today. My interests are helping small businesses, protecting the hard-earned dollar of the taxpayer and preserving our constitutional rights. I'm pro-life, a Second Amendment supporter and truly believe the ticket to the American Dream is fiscal responsibility.

I grew up right here in Missouri and learned the meaning and value of hard work at a young age as I grew up working on my family's 160-acre farm. When I needed to pay tuition, I didn't look for a handout. Instead I raised hogs and cattle to pay my own way through college. I've been a farmer, a banker and an entrepreneur and I pull on all of these past experiences to better serve my district, as well as my country.

I've been awarded the Taxpayer Hero Award from the Council for Citizens Against Government Waste, the Guardian of Small Business Award from the National Federation of Independent Business, the Defender of Economic Freedom Award from the Club for Growth and more because I know how to create jobs and build a strong economy.

I recently spoke out against Democrats and their support for arbitrary restrictions that keep small businesses closed while massive corporations were allowed to stay open. Forcing a small family restaurant to stay closed and suffer while allowing places like Walmart and Target to stay open is not in the best interest of Americans and our economy; it's a bullying tactic being played out by far-left Democrats. They want to appear "woke" on COVID-19 while not challenging large corporations with lobbyists and funds that could hurt their career. Instead they've chosen to target the small businesses who don't have the platform to fight back.

I'm reaching out to you now because I fear this is only the beginning of the arbitrary and hypocritical policies that will be proposed under a Democrat-run government. I'm prepared to spend the next 2 years fighting back against the policies that hurt Americans and small business, but I can't do it without your support. [**Will you join my team and I in our effort to fight back against the far-left Democrats who are trying to destroy our free-market economy****?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i6_oL67rAMOikO0CcdTqAfKT2IdfQ9MuWMAr6kIhMvJf76uHuIAOXPT2IV1QsJ6v8FcH07Up3uo72WVLSVscG2QleSTKBDBV5FioWAvmtPoofZ0MUImWQHb8rwnGdhT5us15I0_CoSaTrN4fbagWMxzT5NJXnnIzkMwqtN0d0ssz1gwm1iDzxhburFzlMq6TM1iXPJBLzPqIAspNKSy5QPOwcl-gV2fCjjLEiISr-r7MrMFwMmFX-9kev8-IxLJ9x5xSAY4b5YZK0ovrsZ7JwkPNnX56TVGWia4zN7dXKP3EKAcNN7aW7--uiObcJ-ToZpcBAoXjatqt5vlR4M4aeN4rFRXT5T38lToPl5Kvf1xd9jQf37_jPnuD4zSOzBukYR79gSOChl-KAKF0ZhiIDm167TWjA8M7nNxK3Lhwq64=&c=3k796tcGCEo886Yl2zcw_ormC3eb6ior8FmV4OVXWIwYmGgdr-7gdQ==&ch=fDh_5wYHLV3GTvtvxtdqPqtfb6yBHb4jfS4PuDG1tM8tMTWfJtBuKQ==) I hate asking for donations, but I can't express to you how important your support is to keep my team and I working against the radical left's agenda.

If you're able to donate, thank you. Your donation is incredibly appreciated and will go straight to pushing back against the radically progressive agenda being promoted by the radical left.

If you can't donate, or are still hesitant, I understand. I simply ask that you **visit my website here -> [blaineforcongress.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i6_oL67rAMOikO0CcdTqAfKT2IdfQ9MuWMAr6kIhMvJf76uHuIAOXPT2IV1QsJ6vcyHzP0J7WKOcMPAWQuRKBRdQZ1HOhLGab_Lgfkk6qqpGqbaAP9AepndRVO0pH37TXhTS8aYfQdmcVyHbvERsYA==&c=3k796tcGCEo886Yl2zcw_ormC3eb6ior8FmV4OVXWIwYmGgdr-7gdQ==&ch=fDh_5wYHLV3GTvtvxtdqPqtfb6yBHb4jfS4PuDG1tM8tMTWfJtBuKQ==)**. You can learn all about my background, my work and the issues that I believe are most pressing to our country.

I've loved serving my district and my country for the past 12 years and I'm honored to have been elected to serve 2 more. I appreciate you taking the time to read this and I hope I can count on your support in the future.

Best,

The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. name: Josh Hawley
subject: My Tucker Carlson Interview
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
Peter,
No matter how many times Joe Biden calls for
"unity," it is clear that Democrats have no interest in unity -
it is clear they will never stop trying to punish me for refusing
to sit down and do as they tell me.
If you are happy to see Democrats use the
full force of the United States government to destroy anyone who
disagrees with them, then you can stop reading now - I only want
to talk to patriots.
I'm serving in the U.S. Senate as a voice for
people who want the Constitution upheld, not for people who want
to use government to promote partisan grudges or progressive
payoffs.
If you stand with me on these principles,
then please support my efforts in the fight for YOUR freedom
today!

STAND WITH JOSH

The Democrats in power have no boundaries, no
sense of decency - they only know to use their power to hurt
anyone who doesn't agree with them. Donald Trump isn't the only
person they are going after - I am also on their hit list because
I refused to back down.
Joe Scarborough called me "unfit" and accused
me of "committing treason."
Joe Biden himself said that I should be "flat
out beaten," and accused me of being a "Nazi" for raising
questions in a format prescribed by the laws of the United
States, granted by our Constitution.
This is the same behavior that gets
conservatives like actress Gina Carano fired. I think it is time
for us to start canceling Democrats at the polls.
They are coming after you and me, and it will
continue until we hold them accountable for their and hate-filled
behavior. I need your help to fight off the Democrats, and to
stop them from using our government to ruin the lives of private
citizens.
If you still believe that principles matter
in our government, then I need you to join me by making a
donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45, and help me
send a strong message to the liberal elites who are telling us to
sit down and do as we are told.
Just the other night, I was on Fox News with
Tucker Carlson to talk more about this, and I hope you can watch
this important interview.

Like I told Tucker, I will NOT back down no
matter how many times the "woke" media and special interests tell
me to shut up and ignore the truth.
If you have had enough of the radical left
punishing anyone who dares to disagree, then I need to know you
are with me.

STAND WITH JOSH

I'll make no apologies for standing up for
President Trump or any other private citizen who is targeted for
cancellation. I will never let them trample on our
Constitutional Rights-I owe that much to you, my family, and to
God.
Please, join me in upholding our
Constitutional Rights and preserving our values for generations
of Americans to come.
Sincerely,

Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri

STAND WITH JOSH

PAID FOR BY HAWLEY FOR SENATE

Please take a minute to read the special message from our
sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep our news service
free of charge.
The sponsorship above reflects the opinions &
representations of the advertiser, & not necessarily the opinion
of USA Freedom Fighters.

body:
The time has come, and Democrats are set to vote on H.R. 1 in the House this week. This our last chance to defeat this bill in Congress... [](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=3960599d079f4f3cb221910e1113a4ea&_e=ZosleimuSg1Y2J4dFHJZWdCWuliftJCDT6djbJhm-zwTLWhM5ncgwVxKq6J6GL3-pBfah6681UQzCVFvk4ZtEI4pCm3CYdvCj4pA2ZuwSjtLiojbjwtydzXNsodVvJmQVC8vX5s7JqHO5KVUnLp_1nlxi2SSCJCZUJ58qSoMbkMrm8XQgqTsxCJn9eHSaTV0ZEjbUMciWLxtWalHsyL27-Nk5VZ3_eeqZ4E8AbK3N_kGHuZoJLo-Mux0PuD6nOYXPRA5I97zU8S2A3hiAJhix0oqu4dlpPknWtupKvf57Q1jPzReZPV_iel-_C0UFd9XfP-2V2tqHtUM5-7nIPwODrblN17GAP0Ekt1EiV4ZyAXKsi6IL429yYxY5klotLXfotquilQT-Uhj4cloUDTyErDxzVOuzMWHLg9QjNZwvq9PJomOBhK-9gZB3FrpWQE19wvuXueJLu0gbBFhI6c28j-cT-lOAmdzMCX4XifBxRk%3D) | |
---
Peter,

It’s MES ー I have bad news.

**Remember last month when I warned you that Democrats were pushing the most radical bill in American History, H.R. 1?!**
[**> > DEFEAT H.R. 1 <<**](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=3960599d079f4f3cb221910e1113a4ea&_e=ZosleimuSg1Y2J4dFHJZWdCWuliftJCDT6djbJhm-zwTLWhM5ncgwVxKq6J6GL3-pBfah6681UQzCVFvk4ZtEI4pCm3CYdvCj4pA2ZuwSjtLiojbjwtydzXNsodVvJmQVC8vX5s7JqHO5KVUnLp_1nlxi2SSCJCZUJ58qSoMbkMrm8XQgqTsxCJn9eHSaTV0ZEjbUMciWLxtWalHsyL27-Nk5VZ3_eeqZ4E8AbK3N_kGHuZoJLo-Mux0PuD6nOYXPRA5I97zU8S2A3hiAJhix3Ay4s2Ce1uv3M3wBi10Au901LporVWHc0D2BTK4O8xxhnh13jD19eIDyPzAiq103vrBuP5bIwI7-zVHFaA3KXe27Y2lliYib-oIYjzXlsjE3AFCEU5tV9xfaGQAsiD4zKOSme_wHkh5bsbGMfBiwX3NNn1JgVKqPDdR-YidWsaOkQUa1zLc0lCFtSubE7iz0sLL7vF3df7K4KurtofHAiE%3D)
Well, the time has come, and Democrats have passed it in the House!

**H.R. 1 will: **
* Nationalize our Elections!
* Invalidate your vote!
* Unconstitutionally Seize Power from the States!

name: Giffords
subject: The gun lobby won't give up without a fight
body:
Please give us a chance to explain
#
&zawnj;
Friends -
Tomorrow night at midnight, we are going to close the books on what may be the most important fundraising drive ever for our campaign to change our gun laws. **_Here 's why:_**
The Biden-Harris administration represents the best chance we started this work to enact meaningful federal change that will make our communities safer from gun violence.
This issue is a **_top priority_** for President Biden and Vice President Harris. The nation is behind them. We have helped their team identify executive actions they can take.
But the fight in Congress won't be easy. The gun lobby won't give up four year's worth of gains overnight. But if we have the resources to keep moving public opinion on this issue, defending President Biden's actions, and holding Congress accountable, then we are going to usher in a new year of gun safety in this country.
So we are launching a 72-hour fundraising drive. It ends tomorrow at midnight, and we need your help to reach our goals.
**[Can you rush a $3 donation to Giffords PAC today to help reach our fundraising goals before our deadline ends**tomorrow** at midnight? We are so close to dramatic change on this issue.](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee1c0/78fba3aa/609ca2b2/50aad030/621417224/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMDUtMi1udGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210305-2-ntl")**
For the first time ever, it is widely understood that gun violence prevention is a winning issue. Let us assure you that wasn't always the case. If the Biden administration acts and the public is behind them, then we have a chance to for extraordinary progress.
Thanks in advance for your support.
Sincerely,
Team Giffords

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee1c0/78fba3aa/609ca2b2/50aad033/621417224/VEsE/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.
